activeVisitCheckFailedSafe: A new visit was not created because the patient's active visits could not be verified. Refresh and try again.
anamnesisPlaceholder: Describe the reason for consultation and chronological narrative...
attentionCheckpointUnavailableSubtitle: The browser could not preserve the pending state. Retry reconciliation or contact support without repeating the clinical record.
attentionCheckpointUnavailableTitle: Do not close or reload this window
attentionCreateRejectedSubtitle: The server rejected the record and did not confirm a new attention. Review the data and permissions before trying again.
attentionEncounterVerificationFailureSub: The server returned an attention record, but it could not be verified for this patient and visit. Do not repeat the record; review the clinical history.
attentionQueueClosurePendingSubtitle: Do not register the attention again. Verify the record already returned by the server and complete the queue closure.
attentionQueueEntryInactiveSubtitle: The queue entry is no longer active or changed. Refresh the queue and review the clinical history before recording another attention.
attentionQueueUpdateFailureSubtitle: The clinical attention was saved, but the queue could not be updated. Check its status before trying again.
attentionReconciliationRequiredTitle: Review the clinical record before continuing
attentionSaveFailureSubtitle: The emergency attention could not be completed. Review the clinical record and queue status before trying again.
attentionSaveUnverifiedSubtitle: It was not possible to confirm whether the clinical attention was saved. Review the patient's record before repeating the action.
attentionSavedSubtitle: Emergency attention has been saved successfully.
cannotMovePatientWithoutVisit: The patient cannot be moved to attention without an active visit.
clearAllQueueEntriesWarningMessage: This will remove all patients ({{count}}) from the queue. This action cannot be undone.
clearAllQueueEntriesWarningMessage_many: This will remove all patients ({{count}}) from the queue. This action cannot be undone.
clearAllQueueEntriesWarningMessage_one: This will remove all patients ({{count}}) from the queue. This action cannot be undone.
clearAllQueueEntriesWarningMessage_other: This will remove all patients ({{count}}) from the queue. This action cannot be undone.
confirmRemovePatientFromQueue: Are you sure you want to remove <1>{{patient}}</1> from {{queue}}?
connectExplainer: Get in touch with the community
couldNotCloseVisit: The emergency visit could not be closed. Close it manually from the patient chart.
couldNotCreateVisitSafely: The emergency visit creation could not be confirmed. Verify the patient's active visits before trying again.
couldNotSaveAdministrativeNotes: Could not save emergency administrative note
criticalPatientsSubtitle: Level I - Resuscitation patients in queue
diagnosisPlaceholder: E.g.: J18.9 - Unspecified pneumonia, R50.9 - Fever
emergencyDescription: Patient at vital risk or decompensation. Requires priority evaluation.
emergencyDirectAttentionSubtitle: Priority I — Triage can be completed during care.
emergencyLocationNotConfigured: The emergency operational location is not configured.
emergencyModuleErrorSubtitle: This emergency section could not be displayed. Try again; if the problem continues, reload the page or contact support.
emergencyNote: Minimum data for emergency. Profile can be completed later.
emergencyUnderExistingVisit: The patient has an active "{{visitType}}" visit; the emergency attention will be recorded under that visit.
emergencyVisitLocationConflictSafe: The active emergency visit belongs to another location. It was not reused and no new visit was created; review the episode and location before continuing.
errorMovingPatientToAttentionQueue: Could not send the patient to the attention queue
extensionExplainer: Here are some colored boxes. Because they are attached as extensions within a slot, an admin can change what boxes are shown using configuration. These boxes happen to be defined in this module, but they could attach to this slot even if they were in a different module.
getStartedExplainer: Create a frontend module from this template
identityDocumentConfigurationError: The identity document cannot be registered because of an invalid configuration. Contact an administrator.
incompatibleActiveVisitSafe: The patient has an active visit of another type. It was not reused and no new visit was created; review the episode before continuing.
initialPriorityDescription: Detailed priority is assigned during triage.
learnExplainer: Learn how to use the O3 framework
moveErrorGeneric: An error occurred while moving the queue entry
moveErrorSafe: The patient's move could not be confirmed. Refresh and verify both queues before repeating the action.
moveSuccessMessage: The patient has been moved to {{queue}}
multipleActiveEmergencyVisitsSafe: Multiple active emergency visits were found. No new visit was created; reconcile the episodes before continuing.
nationalityCatalogUnavailable: The nationality catalog could not be loaded
nationalityRequiredConceptUnavailable: The required nationality cannot be validated against the available catalog. Contact an administrator.
nationalityVerificationRequired: Nationality must be validated against the configured catalog before registering the patient.
noVisitFound: No active visit found for this patient
patientAddedToQueueSubtitle: The patient has been registered and sent to the triage queue with status "Pending triage".
patientHasActiveVisit: The patient already has an active visit
patientMovedToAttentionQueueWithPriority: Patient sent to attention with priority {{priority}}
patientQueuedSuccess: Paciente enviado a cola de triaje
patientQueuedSuccessSubtitle: El paciente ha sido registrado y enviado a la cola de triaje.
patientRegistrationPendingVerification: It could not be confirmed whether the patient was already registered. Do not create another record or HCE; check for the patient by HCE before continuing.
patientRegistrationSafeError: Could not complete the registration. Try again or contact the system administrator.
patientSearchSafeError: Could not complete the search. Try again.
patientServedSuccessfully: Patient has been marked as in service
patientsWaitingTriageSubtitle: Assign triage level to proceed with treatment
pleaseSelectPriority: Please select a priority before continuing.
priorityIDescription: Patient whose clinical condition may put their life, vital function, or organ at imminent risk.
priorityIIDescription: Patient at risk of complication or decompensation of the current illness or injury.
priorityIIIDescription: Patient with an acute condition, without current vital risk, who needs same-day care.
priorityIIITooltip: Patients without risk of death or disabling sequelae. They require attention in the Emergency Topic Area, with Priority I and II cases taking precedence.
priorityIITooltip: Patients with a sudden, acute condition at risk of death or serious complications, requiring attention within 10 minutes of admission. They will be treated in Emergency Consultation Rooms.
priorityITooltip: Patients with sudden and critical health deterioration, at imminent risk of death, requiring immediate attention in the Resuscitation Room - Shock Trauma.
priorityIVDescription: Patient with a chronic condition, without evidence of recent deterioration, who needs care.
priorityIVTooltip: Patients without compromise of vital functions or risk of immediate complications, who can be treated in Outpatient Clinics or Decentralized Consultation Rooms.
prioritySelectionInfo: Select the priority level based on the patient's initial assessment. This will determine the order of care.
queueActionFailureSubtitle: The queue action could not be confirmed. Refresh and check its current state before trying again.
queueCheckpointUnavailableSubtitle: The browser could not preserve the pending admission. Review the queue or contact support before repeating the submission.
queueCheckpointUnavailableTitle: Do not close or reload this window
queueClearFailureSubtitle: The queue could not be cleared completely. Some entries may already have been removed; refresh and review the queue before repeating the action.
queueEntryAbsenceConfirmedSubtitle: Two checks found no entry. The block was removed; review the queue once more before sending the patient again.
queueEntryAbsenceNeedsConfirmationSubtit: This check found no entry. Review the queue and verify again before enabling another submission.
queueEntryCreationFailureSubtitle: The patient's queue entry could not be confirmed. Review the queue and do not send the patient again until their status is verified.
queueEntryCreationNotAttemptedSubtitle: The entry was not created because the current queue state could not be verified. Refresh and try again.
queueEntryCreationRejectedSubtitle: The server rejected the admission and did not confirm a new entry. Review the data and permissions before trying again.
queueEntryFailedVisitKept: The visit was recorded but the patient did not enter the queue. Please try again.
queueEntryReconciledSubtitle: The patient was confirmed in the queue. Review the queue before starting another admission.
queueEntryReconciliationPendingSubtitle: The pending admission could not be reconciled. Review the queue and do not send the patient again until their status is confirmed.
queuesPartiallyCleared: {{succeeded}} of {{total}} entries were ended; {{failed}} failed. Please try again.
rangeValidationWarningDetail: Some values are outside the allowed range for this patient. Check the marked fields.
searchOrRegisterDescription: Search for an existing patient or register a new one to send them to the triage queue.
selectedQueueHasNoAllowedPriorities: The selected queue has no configured allowed priorities.
servePatientCheckpointUnavailableSubtitl: The browser could not preserve the pending transition. Verify the status before leaving and do not repeat the action.
servePatientCheckpointUnavailableTitle: Do not close or reload this window
servePatientFailureSubtitle: The patient's transition to in-service status could not be confirmed. Check the queue status before trying again.
sessionExpiredError: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
transitionErrorGeneric: An error occurred while transitioning the entry
transitionErrorSafe: The transition could not be confirmed. Refresh and verify the queue status before repeating the action.
transitionSuccessMessage: Queue entry has been transitioned successfully
triageCompletedSuccessfully: Patient has been triaged and sent to the attention queue
triageErrorGeneric: An error occurred while completing triage
triageIncompleteMessage: Vitals were saved, but required data is missing to assign priority and send the patient to attention.
triageTransitionUnverifiedSafe: The vital signs were saved, but the move to attention could not be confirmed. Do not save the vital signs again or repeat triage; review the queue.
unknownWarning: It will be registered as UNKNOWN. It can be updated later.
urgencyDescription: Patient without immediate vital risk. Will be evaluated at triage.
usefulLinks: Below are some links to useful resources
valueAboveAbsolute: Value {{value}} is outside the allowed range (max: {{max}} {{units}})
valueBelowAbsolute: Value {{value}} is outside the allowed range (min: {{min}} {{units}})
